CustomField.description: When checked, matches will be validated using additional logic (e.g., Luhn algorithm for credit cards). The validation type is determined by the pattern name.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enable secondary algorithmic validation after the regex matches. Reduces false positives for checksummed data like credit cards (Luhn) and IBANs. Requires a matching Validator Type value.
CustomField.label: Requires Validation
